## Week in Review: 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-07

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 15.9.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.7 (-9.5% WoW), sentiment: negative (-0.12)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.3 (-27.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.18)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 2.1 (+15.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.25)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 15.9 (+60.9% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.16)
